channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: No cleaner, 23rd April
item.description:
Streets are not being cleaned just like the leaves weren’t now the tree is letting of some what substance that causes allergies I’m cleaning it all the time I really don’t know what the service charge is being used for because it’s not a cleaner

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Richmond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Woodrow house nw6, 23rd April
item.description:
Failure of housing association to maintain their own storage spaces leading to materials falling out onto the street and not being cleaned up by their cleaners

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped go cart frames (?) at junction into grange walk from Tower Bridge road, 22nd April
item.description:
Yet more fly tipping… Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grange Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged openreach cabinet, 22nd April
item.description:
Damaged openreach cabinet on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fore Street, Edmonton

item.title: Dumped broom and chair by alleyway into Allwyn court from grange walk, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumped broom and chair by alleyway into Alwyn Court on Grange walk (next to 67 Grange walk) please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grange Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant potholes in junction, 22nd April
item.description:
Going from Westpole Ave to Bramley Road, several significant holes in the road - especially dangerous for cyclists.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westpole Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 22nd April
item.description:
The street light at the end of Palace square is out and it's very dark especially when walking next to the park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress and rubbish outside 121 elderfield rd, e5, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumped mattress outside 121 Elderfield Rd, E5. Also domestic rubbish spilling out onto the pavement from the big metal bins next to 121 Elderfield Rd
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd April
item.description:
Wooden debris large pieces of broken furniture, door left on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Club Gardens Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd April
item.description:
Dumped some time last night and wasn't picked up with the rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus shelter flyposted, 22nd April
item.description:
This area is constantly being illegally flytipped. please remove and investigate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sumner Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.description:
On footbridge above the road.

item.title: Detritus left post bin collection, 22nd April
item.description:
Yet another week of stuff left uncollected

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 305, Trinity Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box of large gas bottles, dumped., 22nd April
item.description:
A full box of new large gas bottles has been dumped a the back of the footway on The Close, near the St Johns Road end.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bumper, 22nd April
item.description:
The bumper on the road helps to reduce the speed on Charlton Church lane, however when heavy vehicle such as bus drive on it makes the building at number 74 Charlton Church lane shake. The vibration are perceived throughout the building and over time are creating cracks on wall. I would appreciate if the bumper could be made more smooth or if the council would consider to re-direct heavy vehicle to other routes. This is an ongoing issue for years.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheelie bins permanently on pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
Wheelie bins permanently on pavement causing problems with ability to use the footpath as it should be 199 brook Street erith Kent
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 199, Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
